item.title: EX:CHANGE 2026: A new kind of conference for language professionals
item.description: If you're ready to explore the potential for change, don't miss EX:CHANGE 2026. Organized by the Institute of Translation and Interpreting (ITI) and marking its 40th anniversary, this two-day event takes place 1–2 July 2026 in Milton Keynes, UK and is focused on participation, not... Continue Reading

item.title: ATC Gold Conference 2026 Is Open for Registration
item.description: Registrations are open for the UK’s Association of Translation Companies’ landmark ATC Gold Conference, taking place in Glasgow in October 2026. For language service companies looking to future-proof their business, this is the event to be at. As the UK’s Association of... Continue Reading

item.title: CFP: 47th Translating and the Computer Conference (TC47)
item.description: 47th Translating and the Computer Conference (TC47) Luxembourg, 8 to 10 December 2026 https://asling.org/tc47/ AI-assisted or AI-eclipsed? Language services between promise and pressure AsLing invites submissions for the 47th edition of the Translating and the Computer Conference (TC47), to... Continue Reading

item.title: Orchestrum TBMS Presentation at the Ionian University in Corfu
item.description: Ciklopea will present its proprietary translation business management system Orchestrum to students of the Ionian University in Corfu on May 29 at 10:30 AM. The session will be focused on how language-industry technology shapes real operational work and professional development. Continue Reading

item.title: European Association for Machine Translation Conference is 15-18 June
item.description: Join Us at EAMT 2026 in Tilburg, Netherlands! The 26th Annual Conference of the European Association for Machine Translation (EAMT) is taking place June 15–18, 2026, at the Schouwburg Concertzaal in Tilburg, Netherlands, hosted by Tilburg University's ISMT Research Group. EAMT 2026 is the... Continue Reading

item.title: CRO Leadership Success as Vistatec Accelerates AI-Enabled Localization
item.description: Vistatec, the global multilingual content and AI-enabled localization provider, today celebrates the one-year anniversary of Caroline O'Connell's appointment as Chief Revenue Officer. Continue Reading

item.title: Call for Sessions Now Open! Unicode Technology Workshop 2026
item.description: The call for session and tutorial proposals is now open for UTW 2026! Organizations and individuals wishing to demonstrate leadership in global software, multilingual UX, internationalization, and cultural preservation are invited to participate as session hosts and tutors. Continue Reading

item.title: Stay Alert to Phishing Emails Posing As GALA
item.description: We are aware of an increase in phishing and spoofing emails that appear to come from GALA. These messages may use familiar branding or language but are not sent by GALA staff and are designed to trick recipients into sharing personal information or moving conversations off secure channels. Continue Reading

item.title: New Report Finds That Interpreting Technology Can Make Language Access More Reliable
item.description: Boostlingo’s State of Interpreting Technology 2026 Report, based on 370+ stakeholders, finds that language access is expanding but unreliable. Half report unmet interpreter needs. Rising operational complexity—not supply alone—drives gaps. AI interpreting is emerging, but effective orchestration acr Continue Reading

item.title: Creative Words and Webvisibility partner to support multilingual GEO strategies
item.description: Creative Words is pleased to announce its partnership with Webvisibility, an Italian search and web analytics agency specializing in digital visibility strategies, search marketing, and AI-powered search optimization. Continue Reading

item.title: LEO's 13th International Virtual Conference
item.description: Register for the upcoming conference on 25-26 June. This year’s theme, “We Are Here To Stay: The Irreplaceable Language Industry,” reflects the critical and evolving role of interpreters, translators, and all language professionals in today’s dynamic landscape. Early bird closes 30 April. Continue Reading

item.title: GALA Annual Survey 2026 Findings
item.description: Each year, GALA’s Annual Survey offers a candid look at how our community experiences the association. We find out what’s working well and where we must improve, and we gauge the community’s sentiments about the association and the value we create. Continue Reading
